name: Hot Milk Cake
recipeInstructions:
1. In a mixing bowl, beat eggs at high speed until thick, about 5 minutes.
2. Gradually add sugar, beating until the mixture is light and fluffy.
3. Combine flour and baking powder; add to batter with vanilla, beating until smooth.
4. In a saucepan, heat milk and butter just until the butter melts, stirring occasionally.
5. Add the heated milk and butter to the batter, beating until combined.
6. Pour the batter into a greased 1 3-inch by 9-inch by 2-inch baking pan.
7. Bake at 350°F for 30-35 minutes or until a toothpick inserted into the center of the cake comes out clean.
8. Cool on a wire rack.
Yield: 12-16 servings.
